_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-08 Kite historical data (official, live session) — still end-of-day candles, not tick-level. Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 3/6, PE 2/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1380.7 is above EMA18 (1368.49) and EMA50 (1328.73) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (31.37) is above its signal line (29.29) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price broke below pivot support S1 (1405.47) -- breakdown confirmed (+2 PE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 0.07%) is muted -- no edge from this factor
